# Let's load the provided JSON files and search as per instructions.
import json, re, unicodedata, os, sys, math, itertools
from difflib import SequenceMatcher

quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-Kjf8kioBqNjsW3Z6BUAgeu-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-D3aKALkQAv6nYj9sKob7Ho-six_hadith_books.json"

with open(quran_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    quran = json.load(f)
with open(hadith_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    hadiths = json.load(f)

# Inspect keys
q_keys = quran[0].keys() if isinstance(quran, list) else quran.keys()
h_first = hadiths[0] if isinstance(hadiths, list) else None
q_keys, list(h_first.keys())[:10]

import re

AR_DIACRITICS = re.compile(r"[\u064b-\u0652\u0670\u0653-\u065f\u06d6-\u06ed]")
TATWEEL = "\u0640"
PUNCT = re.compile(r"[\u0600-\u06FF]")  # we'll not remove Arabic letters; we will remove punctuation separately

# Arabic punctuation range maybe 060C comma etc; we'll remove punctuation and non-letters/digits/spaces
NON_LETTER_DIGIT = re.compile(r"[^\u0621-\u063A\u0641-\u064A0-9 ]+")

def normalize_arabic(s):
    if s is None:
        return ""
    s = s.strip()
    s = s.replace(TATWEEL, "")
    # unify forms
    s = s.replace("أ", "ا").replace("إ", "ا").replace("آ", "ا")
    s = s.replace("ى", "ي")
    s = s.replace("ؤ", "و").replace("ئ", "ي")
    s = s.replace("ة", "ه")  # maybe helpful
    # remove diacritics
    s = AR_DIACRITICS.sub("", s)
    # remove punctuation-like characters (keep Arabic letters and digits and spaces)
    s = NON_LETTER_DIGIT.sub(" ", s)
    # collapse spaces
    s = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", s)
    return s.strip()

def lcs_length(a, b):
    # compute length of longest common subsequence (not substring)
    # But LCS can be heavy. Use SequenceMatcher to get ratio and also we can approximate.
    return SequenceMatcher(None, a, b).ratio()

def token_f1(a, b):
    ta = a.split()
    tb = b.split()
    if not ta and not tb: 
        return 1.0
    if not ta or not tb:
        return 0.0
    sa = set(ta)
    sb = set(tb)
    inter = len(sa & sb)
    prec = inter / len(sa) if sa else 0
    rec = inter / len(sb) if sb else 0
    if prec + rec == 0:
        return 0.0
    return 2*prec*rec/(prec+rec)

def robust_similarity(a, b):
    a_n = normalize_arabic(a)
    b_n = normalize_arabic(b)
    if not a_n or not b_n:
        return 0.0
    # use combination of SequenceMatcher ratio and token F1
    r1 = lcs_length(a_n, b_n)
    r2 = token_f1(a_n, b_n)
    return max(r1, r2), (a_n, b_n, r1, r2)

full_span = "وَمَن يَتَّخِذْ اللَّهَ وَلِيًّا فَإِنَّهُ هُوَ الْمَحْصُورُ الْغَنِيُّ"
normalize_arabic(full_span), robust_similarity(full_span, full_span)

# Build lists of texts
q_ayahs = quran  # list of dicts with ayah_text
texts_q = [d["ayah_text"] for d in q_ayahs]

def search_candidates(text, topn=10):
    sims = []
    for i, d in enumerate(q_ayahs):
        cand = d["ayah_text"]
        sim, details = robust_similarity(text, cand)
        sims.append((sim, i, cand, details, d))
    sims.sort(reverse=True, key=lambda x: x[0])
    return sims[:topn]

top = search_candidates(full_span, topn=20)
[(t[0], t[2][:80]) for t in top[:10]]

target_phrase = normalize_arabic("ومن يتخذ الله وليا")
# search for verses that contain the phrase after normalization
matches = []
for d in q_ayahs:
    n = normalize_arabic(d["ayah_text"])
    if target_phrase in n:
        matches.append(d)
len(matches)

t5 = normalize_arabic("هو الغني")
cands5 = [(d["surah_name"], d["ayah_id"], d["ayah_text"]) for d in q_ayahs if t5 in normalize_arabic(d["ayah_text"])]
len(cands5), cands5[:10]

cand1 = "وَمَنْ يَتَوَلَّ فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ هُوَ الْغَنِيُّ الْحَمِيدُ"
sim, details = robust_similarity(full_span, cand1)
sim, details

cand2 = "وَمَنْ يَتَوَلَّ اللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُ وَالَّذِينَ آمَنُوا فَإِنَّ حِزْبَ اللَّهِ هُمُ الْغَالِبُونَ"
robust_similarity(full_span, cand2)

# search for verses that include both words "الله" and "وليا" in close proximity (within 3 tokens)
res = []
for d in q_ayahs:
    n = normalize_arabic(d["ayah_text"])
    tokens = n.split()
    # find indices of 'الله' and 'وليا' occurrences
    for i, tok in enumerate(tokens):
        if tok == "الله":
            # look ahead/back for "وليا"
            for j in range(max(0,i-5), min(len(tokens), i+6)):
                if tokens[j].startswith("ولي"): # وليا ولي وليهم etc
                    res.append((d["surah_name"], d["ayah_id"], d["ayah_text"], i, j))
                    break
            break
len(res), res[:10]

# Search for "المحصور" in Quran
t6 = normalize_arabic("المحصور")
[(d["surah_name"], d["ayah_id"], d["ayah_text"]) for d in q_ayahs if "المحصور" in normalize_arabic(d["ayah_text"])]
[(d["surah_name"], d["ayah_id"], d["ayah_text"]) for d in q_ayahs if "الحصور" in normalize_arabic(d["ayah_text"])]
[(d["surah_name"], d["ayah_id"], d["ayah_text"]) for d in q_ayahs if "حصورا" in normalize_arabic(d["ayah_text"])]

# Find Al-Imran 112
[c for c in q_ayahs if c["surah_name"] == "آل عمران" and c["ayah_id"] == 112][:3]

cand3 = "وَمَنْ يَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى اللَّهِ فَهُوَ حَسْبُهُ"
robust_similarity(full_span, cand3)

# Search hadith matn for "ومن يتخذ الله وليا"
t_h = normalize_arabic("ومن يتخذ الله وليا")
candidates_h = []
for d in hadiths:
    text = d.get("Matn") or d.get("hadithTxt") or ""
    if not text: 
        text = d.get("hadithTxt", "")
    n = normalize_arabic(text)
    if t_h in n:
        candidates_h.append((d.get("BookID"), d.get("hadithID"), text[:120]))
len(candidates_h), candidates_h[:5]

# Find verses with substring "ومن يتخذ"
res_yattakhidh = [(d["surah_name"], d["ayah_id"], d["ayah_text"]) for d in q_ayahs if "وَمَنْ يَتَّخِذْ" in d["ayah_text"] or "وَمَنْ يَتَّخِذِ" in d["ayah_text"] or "ومن يتخذ" in d["ayah_text"]]
len(res_yattakhidh), res_yattakhidh[:20]

snippet = "وَمَن يَتَ...الْغَنِيُّ"
normalize_arabic(snippet)
robust_similarity(normalize_arabic(snippet), "وَمَنْ يَتَوَلَّ فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ هُوَ الْغَنِيُّ الْحَمِيدُ")
